parameters.query: SELECT product_id, warehouse_id, available_qty FROM inventory WHERE product_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.items.map(i => `'${i.product_id}'`).join(',') }}]::text[]) AND available_qty > 0 ORDER BY warehouse_id FOR UPDATE NOWAIT;

UPDATE inventory SET available_qty = available_qty - alloc.qty, reserved_qty = reserved_qty + alloc.qty, updated_at = NOW() FROM (VALUES {{ $json.allocations.map(a => `('${a.product_id}', '${a.warehouse_id}', ${a.allocated_qty})`).join(',') }}) AS alloc(product_id, warehouse_id, qty) WHERE inventory.product_id = alloc.product_id AND inventory.warehouse_id = alloc.warehouse_id AND inventory.available_qty >= alloc.qty RETURNING inventory.product_id, inventory.warehouse_id, inventory.available_qty;

meta.description: Consumes validated orders, locks inventory rows, allocates stock across multiple warehouses without going negative, handles partial/full/backorder scenarios, and publishes results downstream.
